metadata.description: Haazel cinematic website builder — 4 skills that turn any domain into a production-grade Next.js site with GSAP scroll effects, scroll-driven video heroes, and optional Sanity CMS auto-blogging.

plugins.name: haazel
plugins.description: End-to-end cinematic website builder. Four skills: /haazel-build (master 8-phase workflow), /haazel-brand-analyzer (forensic DOM extraction), /haazel-cinematic (GSAP module composition), /haazel-auto-blog (Sanity CMS setup).
